what_it_does: MLflow 3.0 is now generally available. MLflow 3.0 on Databricks delivers state of the art experiment tracking, observability, and performance evaluation for machine learning models, generative AI applications, and agents on the Databricks Lakehouse. note This article focuses on MLflow 3 features for traditional machine learning and deep learning models.
why_it_matters: MLflow 3.0 on Databricks delivers state of the art experiment tracking, observability, and performance evaluation for machine learning models, generative AI applications, and agents on the Databricks Lakehouse.
